message.content:
Thoroughly explore the collabspace-web project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web. I need to understand:

1. Package manager and dependencies (package.json)
2. Framework used (Vue, React, etc.) and version
3. Build tools (Vite, Webpack, etc.)
4. Project structure (src directory, components, pages/views, stores, etc.)
5. Monorepo structure if any (workspaces, packages/)
6. ESLint/prettier config
7. CI/CD config (.gitlab-ci.yml)
8. README contents
9. Key scripts (dev, build, test, lint)
10. Routing structure
11. State management
12. API integration patterns

Read package.json, README.md, .gitlab-ci.yml, eslint config, vite/webpack config, main entry files, router config, and explore the src directory. Give me a comprehensive summary.
